_comment: Drop-in provider block for opencode.json — MLX local inference
_usage: 1. Start mlx_lm.server for the desired model (see setup/mlx.md). 2. Merge the 'provider' block below into your opencode.json. 3. Set 'model' to 'mlx/<model-id>'.
_important: The model ID must match exactly what mlx_lm.server was started with (full HuggingFace path). Only one model can be loaded at a time — restart the server to switch models.
